text:
Market today: Chip sector news is mixed. A massive SK Hynix IPO could draw capital, while another tech-hardware IPO (Luxshare) had a tepid debut. This suggests a cautious but potentially active environment for your concentrated tech/chip book.

Your holdings: SOXL is down big (-31.31%) and leveraged; it needs a hard look. SPAL, your new leveraged ETF, is already down -24.25% and very volatile on margin. QQQI is a small loss (-1.9%) but flagged for trim.

Watch: Keep an eye on the broader market reaction to the SK Hynix IPO news. Also, your SMH position has a scanner "WATCH" signal for a potential long entry around 580.85.

Bottom line: Manage your leveraged positions aggressively and stay sharp on chip sector sentiment.
plays: SOXL: This leveraged position is down -31.31%. Review your stop at 200.00; consider a hard exit if it breaks.
SPAL: Your new, leveraged ETF is down -24.25%. Respect the 21.38 stop to prevent further amplified losses.
QQQI: With a -1.9% loss and a 'TRIM' status, consider reducing exposure if it approaches its 52 stop.
